subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved son! Your letter dated July 8, 1914 was received. Its contents [3.5s]... ...Iscariot must not be forgotten; the Divine sheep must constantly be guarded… Were it not for the protecting power of the Covenant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه شما بتاریخ هشتم جولای سنه ۱۹۱۴ رسید مضامین در
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
